creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
To avoid the 'macro exploit' problem mantioned at 
	http://us1.samba.org/samba/whatsnew/macroexploit.html
	the SAMBA team released samba-2.0.10. But samba-ja based on
	samba-2.0.10 is not released yet. It will be out soon.

	For a while, one patch should be added. I made it as
	japanese/samba/files/patch-eb.

Fix: One patch (patch-eb) to source/smbd/reply.c is following.
